# llms-full.txt - extended plain-text discovery metadata for LLMs and AI crawlers
name: Marczak.IO
author: Adam Marczak
url: https://marczak.io
description: A personal technology blog with deep Azure, Logic Apps, integration, serverless, automation, and AI content.
primary_topics: azure,logic-apps,integration,serverless,automation,ai,azure-ai
content_overview: |
  Marczak.IO publishes practical posts on Azure architecture, Logic Apps Standard/Consumption, enterprise integration,
  API/Microsoft Graph automation, Azure Functions, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and AI-powered workflows.
  The site includes tutorials, architecture guidance, cost-saving patterns, performance tuning, and real-world integration examples.
related_site:
  - name: Azure 4 Everyone YouTube
    url: https://www.youtube.com/azure4everyone
    description: Video tutorials for Azure integration, Logic Apps, serverless architecture, and AI automation.
    channel_author: Adam Marczak
    topics: azure,logic-apps,serverless,ai,automation,developer
